text: {"is_complete": false, "next_step": {"type": "form", "prompt_text": "Application Development is the most common category. Now tell us about your supervisor — the FYP-1 form needs to be signed by both you and an accepted supervisor before the Week 2 add/drop deadline.", "config": {"fields": [{"key": "supervisor_name", "label": "Supervisor name (Dr / Prof)", "field_type": "text", "required": true, "placeholder": "e.g. Dr. Aida Ali"}, {"key": "project_title", "label": "Working project title", "field_type": "text", "required": true, "placeholder": "e.g. ML-driven patient triage system"}, {"key": "proposal", "label": "Project proposal (2-page PDF)", "field_type": "file", "required": true, "accepts": ["application/pdf"]}, {"key": "signed_form", "label": "Signed FYP-1 form (FSKTM/FYP/01)", "field_type": "file", "required": true, "accepts": ["application/pdf"]}]}}, "reasoning": "FYP-1 form signed by both parties is mandatory before the Week 2 add/drop deadline (per Faculty Senate Decision 2024-12). Each supervisor has a 5-student quota — students who wait until Week 2 often find their preferred supervisor at quota, so we collect this early.", "running_summary": "Year 3 FSKTM student, Application Development category.", "citations": ["Supervisor Matching", "Documents Required"]}
